_comment: Copy to distribute.config.json (gitignored), set absolute dest paths, run: node scripts/distribute.mjs
_launcher_comment: Add projectId (and optional resource/pmUrl) to a target to auto-generate a self-contained run_daemon.bat/.sh + pm_token.txt.template next to the integrator bundle. resource defaults to 'main', pmUrl to 'http://localhost:3000'.
